title: Pell Carries Alabasta’s Hope
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on pell carries alabasta’s hope, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: Pell Carries Alabasta’s Hope. Pell carries Alabasta’s hope into the air as the bomb plot reaches its most sacrificial moment. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: If our enemy is to be one of the Shichi- bukai,

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Elite Guards of the Alabasta Kingdom "Kicking Claw Guards"

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: ...My, aren't you popular... I'll specially overlook you just this once,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: For you see, we have a reason why we cannot withdraw!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: If you really are the mastermind behind this whole rebellion...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: They're nothing but flies to me.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: The first time I was in the

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Those fools... In order to gain more strength for one brief moment... They drank Gosui...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: The special water that takes away your life...! They... Now have only a few minutes to live... They cannot be saved!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: So you threw away your lives just to challenge me...!

dialogue.speaker: Chaka
dialogue.text: Please forgive our reckless actions, commander chaka...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: But we must let this man know...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Let him know of this country's pain...

summary: This part develops pell carries alabasta’s hope and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
